roles.content: Propositional logic: A comprehensive examination of propositional logic within Logic & Epistemology, exploring foundational concepts, key arguments, and contemporary interpretations.
roles.source: British Journal for the Philosophy of Science

roles.content: Critical perspectives on propositional logic: Examining objections, alternative frameworks, and limitations of dominant approaches to propositional logic.
Recent developments in propositional logic: Current research trends, emerging debates, and new applications of propositional logic in contemporary philosophy.
